title: Denmark planned to blow up Greenland runways if US invaded, reports say
summary_full: Denmark's public broadcaster reports that the US operation to seize Venezuela's leader sparked fears it would act against Greenland.
summary_public: Denmark's public broadcaster reports that the US operation to seize Venezuela's leader sparked fears it would act against Greenland.

DK.label: neutral
